titleStmt.title: Letter from Jeremiah Ryan to the Under Secretary, 3 August, 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Jeremiah Ryan

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: Letter from Jeremiah Ryan to the Under Secretary of Ireland, Sir Robert Chalmers (1858-1938). Mr Ryan was instructed by the under secretary's office several months previous to fill up a form to request a petrol allowance so that he can carry out his professional duties. This letter is a follow up as Mr Ryan has not yet received a reply.Sir Robert Chalmers (1858 - 1938) was sent to Ireland as replacement under-secretary for Sir Matthew Nathan, who had resigned along with Augustine Birrell (1850-1933), his chief secretary, following the outbreak of the Easter Rising in 1916.

msIdentifier.collection: Chief Secretary's Office Registered Papers, CSO RP/1916/5620/13360

correspAction.placeName: The Laurels, Cloghroe, Inniscarra, Co. Cork, Ireland

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
Cloghroe The Laurels Inniscarra, Co. Cork. 3.8.16 Sir I had a communication
from Under Secretary Dublin Castle
about the end of Feb or early March
to fill form re the quantity of
Petrol to be used by me for one
three and six months which I filled
As I heard nothing about it since
I hope I will be able to get the
required amount for my professional
duties. I am
Your Obd. Servant Jeremiah Ryan
The Under Secretary Dublin Castle. Ack. & refer the wishes
to the Petrol Control Committee
J.H. 4/8/16
